Tolaria is already connected to external: Tolaria is already connected to external AI tools for this vault. Reconnect to refresh the configuration, or disconnect to remove Tolaria from those third-party config files.
Tolaria can add its MCP server to extern: Tolaria can add its MCP server to external AI tools for this vault, but it will not touch third-party config files until you confirm here.

Claude Code CLI reads ~/.claude.json, wh: Claude Code CLI reads ~/.claude.json, while Tolaria also refreshes the legacy Claude MCP file for compatibility with older setups. Cancel leaves all files untouched, reconnect is idempotent, and disconnect removes Tolaria's entry again.
Tolaria uses a git repository to track c: Tolaria uses a git repository to track changes, detect moved files, and keep your vault safe. We'll create a local repo — no remote needed.
Clone any remote repository into a local: Clone any remote repository into a local vault folder. Tolaria uses your existing system git configuration for authentication.
Cloning repository... Tolaria will open: Cloning repository... Tolaria will open the vault when git finishes.
